What is the result?

llama8b.text:
Answer: 87
Step 1: Multiply 87 by 3. 87 × 3 = 261
Step 2: Multiply 261 by 2. 261 × 2 = 522
Step 3: Subtract 228 from 522. 522 - 228 = 294
Step 4: Multiply 294 by 3. 294 × 3 = 882
Step 5: Subtract 290 from 882. 882 - 290 = 592
Step 6: Divide 592 by 4. 592 ÷ 4 = 148
Step 7: Add 50 to 148. 148 + 50 = 198
Step 8: Divide 198 by 3. 198 ÷ 3 = 66
Step 9: Multiply 66 by 3. 66 × 3 = 198
Step 10: Multiply 198 by 2. 198 × 2 = 396
Step 11: Multiply 396 by 2. 396 × 2 = 792
Step 12: Divide 792 by 4. 792 ÷ 4 = 198
Step 13: Multiply 198 by 2. 198 × 2 = 396
Step 14: Multiply 396 by 2. 396 × 2 = 792
Step 15: Subtract 609 from 792. 792 - 609 = 183
Step 16: Add 65 to 183. 183 + 65 = 248
Step 17: Divide 248 by 2. 248 ÷ 2 = 124
Step 18: Add 51 to 124. 124 + 51 = 175
Step 19: Divide 175 by 5. 175 ÷ 5 = 35
Step 20: Add 50 to 35. 35 + 50 = 85
Step 21: Subtract 31 from 85. 85 - 31 = 54
Step 22: Multiply 54 by 3. 54 × 3 = 162
Step 23: Divide 162 by 3. 162 ÷ 3 = 54
Step 24: Add 19 to 54. 54 + 19 = 73
Step 25: Subtract 17 from 73. 73 - 17 = 56
Step 26: Multiply 56 by 2. 56 × 2 = 112
Step 27: Add 63 to 112. 112 + 63 = 175
Step 28: Divide 175 by 5. 175 ÷ 5 = 35
The final answer is: $\boxed{87}$
